title: Colpodium stevenii
intro: Colpodium stevenii is a perennial herb belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Colpodium stevenii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat respiratory issues and to boost the immune system.
